channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Are UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s political days numbered?
item.description: British PM resisting intensifying party pressure to step aside.

item.title: Al Jazeera cameraman Ahmed Wishah killed in Israeli attack in Gaza
item.description: Al Jazeera 'strongly condemns the heinous crime of targeting and killing' the Mubasher correspondent.

item.title: US-Iran talks to kick off Sunday in Switzerland, says Pakistan
item.description: Planned negotiations come amid tensions over Israeli attacks in Lebanon and Iran’s announced closure of Hormuz again.

item.title: As ILO convention turns 30, India’s home-based workers demand equal rights
item.description: Convention 177 was adopted on 20 June 1996, recognising home-based workers on a par with traditional wage earners.

item.title: World cup wrap day 9
item.description: World cup wrap day 9

item.title: Iran shuts Strait of Hormuz as Israel tests MOU with Lebanon strikes
item.description: Iran shuts Strait of Hormuz as Israel tests MOU with Lebanon strikes.

item.title: Bolivia declares state of emergency amid blockade crisis
item.description: For several weeks, a wave of protests has erupted over President Rodrigo Paz’s austerity measures.

item.title: Israeli strike kills children in Gaza despite ceasefire claims
item.description: Israeli strike kills children in Gaza despite ceasefire claims

item.title: ‘You could’ve been the greatest’: Trump faces Israeli anger over Iran deal
item.description: Public outrage in Israel mounts over MoU, with many feeling betrayed by the US in its deal with Iran

item.title: How Ivan Cepeda emerged a frontrunner in Colombia’s presidential election
item.description: Critics say Cepeda, a soft-spoken senator, became a 'hero to the left' after he took on a right-wing president in court.

item.title: LIVE: Germany vs Ivory Coast – World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow our live build-up, with full team news coverage, ahead of our text commentary stream service.

item.title: Trump insists Italy’s Meloni sought photos with him to boost popularity
item.description: Comments escalate a row between the once-close leaders that has emerged during the conflict with Iran.

item.title: Iran warns of ‘reciprocal action’ if US doesn’t honour MOU commitments
item.description: Iran warns of ‘reciprocal action’ if US doesn’t honour MOU commitments.

item.title: Nine left in critical condition after UK train collision that killed driver
item.description: More than 80 people received treatment after the crash and 28 remain in hospital.

item.title: Court bans Spanish PM’s wife from leaving country amid corruption probe
item.description: Begona Gomez is accused of using her position as the prime minister's wife ⁠to secure work contracts.

item.title: Where do Iran’s political factions stand on the US peace deal?
item.description: Iran's rival political camps are locking horns over a memorandum of understanding with the US.

item.title: In Nepal’s highlands, climate change threatens Tibet’s Bon faith
item.description: In Lubra, Nepal’s last Bon village, climate-driven floods are destroying homes and land, endangering ancient traditions.

item.title: UK condemns Israeli minister over inflammatory Lebanon remarks
item.description: UK foreign secretary slams Israeli minister's inflammatory remarks amid regional tensions and fragile ceasefire.

item.title: Zelenskyy and top Ukrainian officials return Polish awards in WWII dispute
item.description: The move comes after Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy was stripped of Poland's top honour.

item.title: Spain vs Saudi Arabia: World Cup 2026 – Yamal, prediction, watch, kickoff
item.description: Spain face Saudi Arabia in need of a win to take control of Group H. Can they rediscover their attacking edge?

item.title: Why Tunisia’s renewable energy strategy is facing resistance
item.description: Giving concessions for renewable projects to foreign corporations will not help solve the country’s energy crisis.

item.title: An Israeli court has convicted seven men over the 2021 lynching of Sa’id Mo
item.description: An Israeli court has convicted seven men over the 2021 lynching of Sa’id Moussa, ending a five-year trial.

item.title: Slave trade reenacted on Juneteenth as leaders demand reparations
item.description: Ghana has been hosting a conference to advance the UN resolution declaring slavery the ‘gravest crime against humanity.'

item.title: MSF says conditions in Lebanon’s Nabatieh resemble a ‘death trap’
item.description: Israel has stepped up attacks on parts of southern Lebanon, including Nabatieh, since midnight on Friday.

item.title: German journalist held in Syria back home, family says
item.description: Eva Maria Michelmann's brother says she had been held in the Syrian city of Raqqa since January.
